creator: jlevine@boulder.nist.gov
text:
Sysgen Make depend fails:
   in fuction usage: aicasm.c line 320
   Internal Compiler Error, Bus Error 10
Compiler and this subroutine not modified from the CDROM version.

Hardware platform is new Dell Optiplex 745 System

I have also reported this bug to gnu as bug number 33621
since I don't know the real cause.

How-To-Repeat: Make Depend fails every time at exactly the same point.
